developer_response.body: I'm currently trying to fix the no voice chat bug, hopefully i'll get it fixed soon!

reviews.review_description: Hi the discord link dose not work

This game feels like a magical playground that you get to play in. I would not go the gorilla tag route with this game and make other players directly play against each other. I think it would be better to add parkour levels where players get to play with each other. Like perhaps a feature where players can grab other players hands for a short period to allow them to make farther jumps. It would also be cool if there were walls that blasted you off of them to stop wall running and climbing on levels that would be too easy with them. Currently the only gripe is that when you fall off of the map, you don't respawn.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! Next update I'll think about putting in a racing map. If I do put it in, I'll credit you in-game for the idea. Bye for now!

reviews.review_description: Make grab able items like a snow map with snowballs or a house map with like spatula, remote, etc
What happened too this game it was soo fun but now it gets no updates

developer_response.body:
Hello Eternal!

Recently, I've been working on a lot of other vr projects. However, at least a month ago I started to work on a remake of RA, so far it's way better than the current RA version and once it's done I'll publish the update!
